review_title: My favourite Tool for Backlinks
author: Ersan T.
pros: Backlink SEO has solid database and provides you accurate results, with its cost comparing to others in the market, its uncomparable to any other.
cons: To be honest i can't say anything that i dislike about the product, as an early stage application, it is evolving and completing the missing parts.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Solid Tool for Those Focused on Backlinks
description: I’m still digging into the platform and all that it can do, but the onboarding has been very helpful and the interface is easy to navigate.
author: Dave C.
pros: As implied in their name, BacklinkSEO is primarily focused on ..yep you guessed it…backlinks. With other SEO tools backlinks might be a footnote or just a half-baked feature amongst many, but BacklinkSEO has made it their mission to help users extract as much data as possible from their (or their competitors) backlinks. I really like that I can easily drill in and see what links come from “do follow” vs “nofollow” sources. if you need to edit/add backlinks manually to your dashboard you can easily do that as well. However, I would say the biggest value this platform brings to the table is the campaign tool. This allows you to check a weblink or blog post and see who linked to the article. From there you can quickly connect to Hunter.io or Snovio and receive validated emails for the contacts who linked to your article. Next you can add these contacts to an email campaign (all within BacklinkSEO) and reach out to them directly. This is a huge win if you are looking to develop relationships with the people that are already aware of and support your product/service.
cons: Overall this is a solid tool thats I am looking forward to see grow. Currently they have integrations with Hunter.io and Snovio for verifying emails. I would love to more integrations added to this list.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Its a good tool but not a great one
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Tool is simple to use and its best for its use case considering the cost to benefit ratio.
cons: The tool is very early in development and will require a lot of time to improve.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Monitor Backlinks & Automate Outreach Campaigns
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: BacklinkSEO does quite a few things but we mainly like two features, backlink monitoring and creating automated outreaching campaigns. You simply add your existing backlinks and BacklinkSEO will monitor for you, and it notifies you if any of the backlinks go down. Outreach feature is kind of cool, you perform different searches to identify backlinking opportunities and platform will show you the list of sites and then the in-built scraping feature will go through them and find email addresses and create a list for you. And then you can create and send drip email campaigns within the platform.
cons: It has a feature to scan and find backlinks on their own but it doesn't have enough data yet, so that feature is kind of useless at this time. But I am hoping that the team will change that soon.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A diamond in progress
description: Overal, really really good. It's not common at all to talk with people so transparent and enthousiastic.
author: Matignon L.
pros: Customer support is top notch! The team is serious and enthousiastic. They have huge ambitions and they obviously can afford them. The future is bright! The tool in inself is not the sexiest and easiest in the world but who honestly cares for this kind of tools? It's fast and reliable, and improving every two days. Keep up the food work!
cons: At the moment the backlinks database is still a bit light, especially for non-US people like me I guess (I'm french). But they work on it and I'm pretty confident this is not gonna be a problem at all in a few months.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

pros: I used BacklinkSEO since it's inception for my site [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN]. It isn't you a jack of all trades but master of none stuff. The site primarily focuses on backlinks. You will as a backlink guy find a lot of features that help you track backlinks, build link with outreach, outreach template, and contact data of the blog owners. I can confidently say that now there is no need for me to buy tools for a backlink as it does it all and very well.

review_title: The solid SEO tool I love most
description: I'm satisfied when using it for now and can't wait for next features released, especially Guest Post monitoring features.

pros: I love the backlink monitoring report feature that reports to me weekly how my backlinks status such as active links, lost links, dofollow links,...that truly important to me. Other tools I used with the same feature never works well like that. I love the report email UI as well. It is neat and clear for all. The support team is responsive, they solve any issue I reported fast and professionally that is the good sign of my next favorite product.
cons: The dashboard UI is not sexy and confused now but look like they developing the new UI in near future. The domain tool check with Moz score that is not enough to me. I need Domain Rating from ahref as well or other similar system score that will be more exactly than only Moz metrics.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Much more than you think, it's far beyond SEO
author: 👨‍💻 Armand M.
pros: BacklinkSEO strength is definitely the powerful email outreach tool combine with the backlink tracker. It integrates with all email SMTP's, Gsuite accounts. It has also an email sending domain warmup feature, very important not to end in spam! You can in few minutes seek juicy backlinks opportunities with their content search engine, find targeted emails and launch your email campaign. The emails templates are rich in case you need some inspiration. It also has integration with most email verification tools like Hunter and also provide their own for free! The UI is very well laid out, responsive and fast. Either ways, you can use it for SEO but also for Sales outreach, that's the beauty of the tool. If you compare to current email outreach tools on the market like Lemlist, Woodpecker, Mailshake this one has an incredible value. The support and development team is fast and constantly adding new features on a weekly basis.
cons: Sincerely I tried, can't find anything that I don't like so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

But since they are well integrated with them, its not hard to use both app from 1 place, so you can ignore this cons pretty easily, and I hope [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] comes with new features.

review_title: Best tool to keep update with your guest posting links
description: My overall experience has been great with BacklinkSEO as it has done everything that I was looking for, the tool has helped me reclaim some of the links back that were removed by site owners as well as identify a negative seo campaign looking at the anchor text saving my site a penalty. So I would recommend it.
author: Kushal D.
pros: I liked the backlink monitor tool where you can put the links to track. They also provide the outreach tool but I like to do my outreach manually so I don't use it. When you do a guest posting campaign at mass for a client it's really hard to keep track of all the links you have built so I was looking for a tool that helps me keep track of the links after the guest post is published. Many times the site owner removes your post or your post's links are made nofollow so by using this tool you can easily monitor your all links. There are two options to automatically fetch as well as manually upload a CSV which makes it easy to upload and track your links.
cons: There is nothing I can say bad about the product as it does most what it promises. I would love them to improve their user interface.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A stepping stone for your link building journey
description: When I purchased BacklinkSEO, I didn't go in with a lot of expectations. As someone who is not new to SEO in general but a newbie to outreach campaigns, BacklinkSEO didn't feel too overwhelming and helped me calm my nerves with its dedicated and simple feature set. The ability to connect Google search console to crawl for backlinks is neat but not flawless. For a big site, it doesn't crawl all the links properly. But the best part was the customer support. It's [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has his ears to the ground and very receptive for quality feedbacks. I already see his team working towards fixing some nagging issues and introducing more features to the product. This tool can only get better from here.
author: Raju P.
pros: Ease of use User experience and design Concentrated feature set Outreach campaign set is elaborative
cons: Concentrated feature set (Yes, it's both a pro and a con) Outreach campaigns are too restricted for solo users

review_title: A Great Backlink Monitoring and Backlink Building Tool
author: Ian K.
pros: I like how easy it is to start monitoring backlinks on my website. All I had to do was connect my Google Analytics and Google Search Console and it fetched all my links. I like being able to see the breakdown by follow, nofollow, and sponsored links. I also appreciate that I don't have to monitor them to make sure they are still live. I also like the ability to run a backlink campaign (I haven't started a campaign yet). This process (from all the videos that the [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has made) is super simple and intuitive (while also being extremely powerful).
cons: Nothing that I dislike at all. It's been a really positive experience so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

BacklinkSEO is the end-all tool for backlinks which is always a difficult and arduous part of an SEO strategy. On top of their great product, BacklinkSEO has amazing support. I highly recommend using this tool for your SEO needs, even if you have another tool that you prefer, in tandem they will create a killer SEO toolbox.
cons: There are not many, if any, cons for this product. It does what it says it will well. Overtime it is bound to get even better.
